title: 详细谈谈DSpark投机解码的原理(1) | 原文
content: DSpark is DeepSeek's open-source speculative decoding framework addressing two key bottlenecks: draft quality degradation and inefficient verification. Current draft models generate candidate tokens quickly but lack contextual dependency, causing declining quality and acceptance rates in later tokens. Additionally, blindly feeding entire long drafts to target models for verification wastes computational resources regardless of actual draft quality.
eventKey: 详细谈谈dspark投机解码的原理
normalizedTitle: 详细谈谈dspark投机解码的原理 1 原文

title: 嘲笑别人的 deepseek 偷跑 100 元后，我被偷跑了 2700 元
content: A developer mocked another user for a stolen DeepSeek API key, then suffered the same fate—losing 2,700 yuan, 27 times more. Their backup LLM provider, a Hangzhou company, saw sudden usage spikes in June due to a stolen key generating 500 million tokens of random translations from a Beijing IP. The company's four API keys followed a sequential UUID pattern; suspiciously, the provider had just overhauled its key system with 100+ character keys and unique base URLs. Despite investigating staff, code security, and servers, no breach source was identified.

title: 1999元的AI戒指，能干掉你的键盘吗？
content: Oasis Devices launched the OASIS 1, a $289 AI smart ring that captures whispered speech and converts it to text via Wispr Flow, targeting users who can't type or speak aloud. It features a 2D touchpad for gesture-based corrections. However, the device faces criticism for poor 16-hour battery life, social awkwardness, and inefficient touchpad editing compared to keyboards. The product reflects a broader Silicon Valley trend toward voice-first computing, with companies like Ramp and Gusto encouraging employees to dictate rather than type. Despite selling out its first batch, the ring is seen as an imperfect transitional device in the uncertain "post-keyboard" era.

title: 别急着买新 MacBook ，苹果还藏着 AI 时代杀手锏
content: Apple plans major MacBook redesigns through 2028. A high-end touchscreen MacBook Ultra with OLED displays and Dynamic Island (replacing the notch) launches late 2026 with M5 Pro/Max chips. M6 chips, using TSMC's 2nm process, will power entry-level MacBook Pros, iPad Pros, and MacBook Airs as a transitional generation without Pro/Max variants. Apple's focus is M7 (2027), designed for on-device AI with enhanced neural engines and 240GB/s memory bandwidth. The company aims to strengthen local AI processing, reduce cloud costs, and potentially expand into data center chips, while securing advanced TSMC production capacity amid competition from AI companies.
eventKey: 别急着买新-macbook-苹果还藏着-时代杀手锏

title: AI 砍掉的第一批大厂人：高薪，高绩效，高P｜深氪
content: Chinese tech firms are conducting large-scale layoffs by mid-2025, with June 30 as a common deadline, driven by AI-driven efficiency gains, stagnant legacy businesses, and AI investment costs. Junior programmers face disproportionate cuts due to lower severance costs and slower AI adoption, while high performers and senior staff are also vulnerable. Companies like Meituan, Alibaba, and Baidu are merging roles, pushing token usage metrics, and flattening hierarchies. Many laid-off workers are turning to startups, manufacturing, or entrepreneurship as traditional tech career paths erode.

title: 刚刚，DeepMind经典巨作再封神，ICML 2026大奖公布
content: ICML 2026 announced its awards in Seoul, with two diffusion model papers winning Outstanding Papers. One from Tsinghua researchers debunks the core premise of arbitrary-order generation in diffusion language models, while another improves sampling precision. The Outstanding Position Paper critiques AI alignment research for unintentionally building censorship infrastructure. DeepMind's 2016 A3C paper received the Test of Time Award. Six honorable mentions covered RLVR honesty, video generation, memorization limits, and grokking in ridge regression. The awards signal diffusion models maturing and AI safety facing internal scrutiny.
eventKey: deepmind经典巨作再封神-icml-2026大奖公布

title: 狂揽2.4万星标：一行命令，AI会自己找技能了
content: Vercel launched "skills," a package manager for AI agents that installs capabilities via one command (`npx skills add <package>`). The tool supports 68+ agents including Claude Code and Cursor, letting users share project-specific conventions as reusable skill packages. A "Find Skills" feature enables AI to search and install matching skills automatically. However, security audits reveal significant risks: over 36% of skills contain flaws, with 13.4% rated severe, including malware and credential theft—posing greater dangers than traditional npm packages since skills merge prompts, code, and system permissions.

title: Token吃掉三成工资，硅谷AI账单失控了
content: SemiAnalysis reports AI token costs now comprise 30% of employee salaries but generate multiples of previous human output. NVIDIA's Huang plans massive token budgets for all engineers. Meanwhile, Uber and Microsoft struggle with runaway AI spending despite unclear productivity gains. MIT research found AI automation economically viable in only 23% of vision-related jobs. However, SemiAnalysis argues costs are collapsing: software and hardware optimizations achieve 14-32x throughput improvements, with model gross margins expanding structurally. Gartner predicts 90% inference cost reduction by 2030. Despite $740 billion in global AI capital expenditure, Goldman Sachs notes minimal macroeconomic impact so far.
eventKey: token吃掉三成工资-硅谷ai账单失控了
normalizedTitle: token吃掉三成工资 硅谷ai账单失控了

title: 悲剧！华人包船沉船，仅4人生还！落水者未穿救生衣… | 原文
content: A fishing charter boat carrying 10 Chinese passengers sank in Georgia Strait near Vancouver on June 28. Only 4 people survived; the other 6—including 4 men and 2 women—are presumed drowned. Most passengers were young adults in their 20s or 30s, and the captain was 23. Survivors were reportedly not wearing life jackets when rescued. The vessel departed from Steveston Fisherman's Wharf in Richmond. Nearby boaters spotted the incident and assisted in rescue efforts amid rough seas.
